title: Lord's Parasol
description: When you encounter the [gold]Merchant[/gold], immediately obtain EVERYTHING he sells.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Automatically purchases all items from the merchant's inventory when entering a merchant room, including character-specific cards, colorless cards, relics, and potions. The card removal option is also purchased if available.
